title: Control-plane intent record
description: Schema-valid record appended by the default control-plane session when it classifies a human natural-language request. The LLM may classify, but this schema is the fail-closed contract before dispatch or ledger append.

intent_id.description: Stable id assigned when the record is appended to .orchestrator/control/intents.jsonl.

recorded_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp assigned by the control-plane session at append time.

raw_user_prompt_summary.description: Concise summary of the human's natural-language request. Do not store secrets.

affected_scope.description: Campaign, milestone, sub-sprint, checkpoint, or role scope affected by the request.

delivery_mode.description: Optional execution topology relevant to this intent. single_milestone uses charter.yaml as the active execution source; campaign uses campaign-plan.json.

roadmap_mutation_ref.description: Optional pointer to a JSONL roadmap mutation record written by the Control Plane for Customer roadmap commands.

next_action.description: The control-plane's next safe action after validation.

status.description: Ledger lifecycle state. Optional in the classifier output; should be present once appended.

evidence_refs.description: Specific files or run refs used as evidence for the classification.

loaded_refs.description: Specific files or state summaries loaded by the default session. Broad globs are forbidden by validator policy.
